source_pr.title: *: add two session variables to control the PD client option
source_pr.body:
Signed-off-by: JmPotato <ghzpotato@gmail.com>

### What problem does this PR solve?

Issue Number: https://github.com/tikv/pd/issues/3149

Add `@@tidb_enable_tso_follower_proxy` and `@@tidb_tso_client_batch_max_wait_time` session variables to control TSO Follower Proxy and PD TSO Client Batch behavior online.

Should be merged after:

* https://github.com/tikv/pd/pull/4204
* https://github.com/tikv/pd/pull/4240
* https://github.com/tikv/client-go/pull/352

### What is changed and how it works?

* Update the PD client.
* Add `@@tidb_enable_tso_follower_proxy` and `@@tidb_tso_client_batch_max_wait_time` session variables.

### Check List

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- [x] Unit test
- [x] Integration test
- [x] Manual test (add detailed scripts or steps below)

![image](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/1446531/138868569-20e6b430-5424-4881-8585-f5671d0adeef.png)

![image](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/1446531/138868509-745d8f1e-3fc0-422c-abff-3b0069230eb4.png)

![image](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/1446531/139425151-b41e5a7e-7e3d-4f9b-b5bb-fdc38c0a3794.png)

![image](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/1446531/139425185-f9889429-7104-4a04-ae71-b83052633d34.png)

### Release note

<!-- bugfix or new feature needs a release note -->

```release-note

```
